sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَشْيُ نَشَاطًا بَدَنِيًّا مُمْتَازًا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje se smatra odličnom fizičkom aktivnošću za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is considered an excellent physical activity for the body.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا التَّمْرِينُ الْبَسِيطُ عَلَى تَقْوِيَةِ الْقَلْبِ وَتَحْسِينِ الْمِزَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Ova jednostavna vježba pomaže u jačanju srca i poboljšanju raspoloženja.
sentences.translationEn: This simple exercise helps strengthen the heart and improve mood.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالْمَشْيِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju hodanje u trajanju od trideset minuta svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend walking for thirty minutes every day.
